text: Figure S3. The protective effect of Que on acinar cells. (A-B) After Que intervention, Prdx1 mRNA expression in MPC-83 cells was quantified by q-PCR, and its protein levels were determined through Western blot analysis (n=3). (C) Representative immunofluorescence images and statistical analyses of HIF-1α, NRF2, and SP1 (n = 5). Scale bar, 25 μm. (D) CCK8 assay for cell viability of MPC-83 cells. (E) Statistical analysis of MDA level of MPC-38 cells on Nc, TAC, TAC+Que, TAC+EV@Que (n=3). Data = Mean ± SD (n=3). Statistical analysis was performed by GraphPad Prism (9.5.0). One-way ANOVA using the Tukey’s multiple-comparison test was applied for comparison among three groups. Nc, negative control; ctrl, control; *P<0.05; **P<0.01; ***P<0.001. n.s. = not significant.
